hero.title: MinMaxValue
hero.subtitle: Poker Ticket Marketplace
hero.description: Buy and sell tournament tickets with ease. Connect with players who can't make their events and find the perfect seat at the table.

simple.title: Simple & Fast
simple.description: List or purchase tickets in just a few clicks. Our streamlined process gets you to the table faster.

secure.title: Secure Transactions
secure.description: Protected payments and verified sellers ensure your money and tickets are safe every step of the way.

pricing.title: Fair Pricing
pricing.description: Market-driven prices mean sellers get fair value and buyers find great deals on tournament entries.
